scripts.build:ui: cd ../../guaymi-modern && npm install && npm run build && cp -r dist/guaymi-modern/browser/* ../back-end/v2/dist/
scripts.db:sync: babel-node --presets env -e "require('babel-polyfill'); const dbConfig = require('./db/db.config').default; dbConfig().then(() => process.exit(0)).catch(err => { console.error(err); process.exit(1); });"
